scenes.voiceover_text: Start your day with a focused mindset.
scenes.image_prompt: A serene sunrise casting a golden hue over a modern city skyline, capturing the stillness and potential of a new day, photorealistic, 16:9 widescreen format.

scenes.voiceover_text: Begin with a quick five-minute meditation.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a person meditating by a large window with soft morning light illuminating a minimalist room, creating a tranquil atmosphere, photorealistic, 16:9 widescreen format.

scenes.voiceover_text: Plan your day with a priority checklist.
scenes.image_prompt: Overhead shot of a hand elegantly writing on a notepad, surrounded by a chic desktop setup with a steaming cup of coffee, natural daylight streaming in, photorealistic, 16:9 widescreen format.

scenes.voiceover_text: Fuel your body with a nutritious breakfast.
scenes.image_prompt: A vibrant breakfast spread featuring fresh fruits, grains, and a smoothie in a bright, modern kitchen setting, photorealistic, 16:9 widescreen format.

scenes.voiceover_text: Boost your productivity and achieve more today!
scenes.image_prompt: Dynamic office scene showcasing diverse professionals energetically collaborating in a sleek, modern workspace, conveying innovation and teamwork, photorealistic, 16:9 widescreen format.
